items.title: The 7 Types of Agent Memory: A Technical Guide for AI Engineers

items.title: When Agents Commit Too Soon: Diagnosing Premature Commitment in LLM Agents
items.abstract: Long-horizon LLM agents can fail quietly: they settle on one reading of the evidence early, then spend the rest of the run defending it. We call this premature commitment. Final-answer scoring misses
